full_text: For reference, here is a font that already has the glyphs that we're just gonna copy. Of note, right, some fonts have different kerning. There's it's not a pure science, but this is generally like the mapping.
_note: Synthesized from the original recovery-bridges-400ms-gap fixture by re-pinning the silence run from 400ms to 200ms. With recovery_window_ms=250 (the new default), recovery still bridges this into a single turn. Companion to recovery-splits-400ms-gap.wav which asserts the inverse direction.
